overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a vibrant natural landscape. The journey progresses from a flower-filled meadow along a dirt path, across a broken wooden bridge, through a shallow swamp, and finally circling a massive ancient oak tree backlit by golden sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: flower meadow with winding dirt path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through the wildflower meadow, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: winding brown dirt trail through the grass
lush green grass with red and purple wildflowers covering the hillsides
deciduous trees framing the path in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through a vibrant open meadow filled with wildflowers. The scene is bright and sunny with scattered trees lining the route, creating a peaceful natural atmosphere.

events.description: transitioning from open meadow onto broken wooden bridge structure over water

agents.ego_description: Geralt carefully stepping onto and crossing the broken wooden bridge with missing planks

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden bridge with missing planks and broken beams
calm water visible beneath and beside the bridge structure
weathered wooden support posts at bridge edges

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a narrow broken wooden bridge spanning water. Geralt crosses carefully over the damaged planks as the environment becomes more enclosed with swampy trees visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow swamp with tall reeds approaching ancient oak

events.description: leaving the bridge and entering shallow swamp water
sun becomes strongly backlit behind the great oak tree, creating golden hour atmosphere

agents.ego_description: Geralt wading through shallow swamp water and tall grass toward the massive oak tree in the distance

entered.detail: murky shallow water with reflections covering the ground
massive ancient oak tree with thick trunk and spreading branches
tall golden reeds and swamp grass lining the water path

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the bridge and wades through shallow swamp water toward a magnificent ancient oak tree. The lighting shifts to a golden backlit glow as the sun positions itself behind the massive tree, creating a dramatic silhouette effect.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient oak clearing with sun flare

events.description: Geralt begins circling around the right side of the great oak tree trunk
passing the tree and continuing straight into the open field beyond

agents.ego_description: Geralt circles the massive tree trunk, examining the bark, then continues past it into the open grassland

entered.detail: open field with scattered trees visible past the oak

segments.scene_description: Geralt circles the massive ancient oak tree, passing close to its gnarled trunk as sunlight flares through the branches. He then continues past the tree into the open grassland beyond, leaving the swamp area behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant meadow that gradually transitions into a dramatic, sun-drenched swamp. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path through an open field of wildflowers under a bright, sunny sky. As the path narrows, the scene shifts toward a broken wooden bridge where the environment becomes more enclosed by swampy trees. The camera then follows him as he wades through shallow water toward a magnificent ancient oak tree, while the lighting transforms into a golden backlit glow that creates a dramatic silhouette. Finally, the view circles the gnarled trunk of the massive tree as sunlight flares through the branches before moving past the oak and back into the open grassland.
